content: Always include ?sslmode=disable in Postgres fallback connection strings for integration tests against non-TLS dev containers
When a GL or financial consumer encounters an unknown enum variant (source_type, payment_method), hard-fail with a non-retriable error — never silently mispost
Cross-module event consumers must declare bead dependencies on the producer module's changes — never start consumer work before producer events land
When a large feature bead surfaces a pre-existing env issue, spawn a child bead to isolate the fix — do not mix env fixes with domain logic commits
Shared tooling config (auth state, browser profiles) belongs in ~/.flywheel/ — project-specific state (bead metadata, retro counters) stays project-local
After adding a new field to a request struct, grep all test files for that struct constructor — update every call site before running tests
Production receipts require caller-provided unit_cost — never default or calculate cost at the inventory layer; cost evidence comes from the caller
New SourceDocType or source_type variants must be added to both the producing module event payload AND every downstream consumer match arm in the same phase
